definition: Extent to which knowledge holders can participate without exclusion or unfair burden
measurement_note: Use compensation language access disability access childcare transport meeting design digital access and schedule flexibility indicators

definition: Extent to which multiple relevant knowledge systems are included and respected
measurement_note: Use scientific local Indigenous practitioner frontline caregiver occupational and lived knowledge representation indicators

definition: Extent to which local knowledge changes decisions budgets rules infrastructure monitoring and recovery systems
measurement_note: Use decision-change logs budget shifts design modifications revised indicators and agency response tracking

definition: Extent to which the process builds legitimacy relationship repair transparency and follow-through
measurement_note: Use trust surveys complaint response public reporting relationship continuity and perceived fairness indicators

definition: Extent to which sensitive knowledge is protected from extraction exposure misuse surveillance or cultural harm
measurement_note: Use consent agreements data governance Indigenous protocols privacy controls aggregation access rules and withdrawal options

definition: Extent to which knowledge holders receive benefit compensation useful outputs shared authorship or community value
measurement_note: Use participant compensation community products benefit agreements data returns and resource commitments

definition: Extent to which institutions follow through on actions and report changes publicly
measurement_note: Use implementation trackers deadlines public dashboards oversight corrective action and accountability reports

definition: Administrative political legal technical financial and civic burden required to implement a strategy
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger feasibility review capacity planning legal review and sequencing analysis
